---
title: "lomatium.vital.rates"
author: "JL"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(AICcmodavg)
library(patchwork)
theme_set(theme_classic(base_size = 18)) #for ggplot

```

```{r}
lom <- read.csv(here("clean_data", "Lomatium_Demography_Data_CLEANED_2016thru2025.csv"))
climate <- read.csv(here("clean_data", "CGOP_climatevalues_scaled.csv"))

#scott used size.t = log(No.leaves.t * Leaf.length.t) as the size measurement
lom <- left_join(lom, climate, by = c("Year" = "year"))
lom <- lom %>% 
  group_by(plantid) %>% 
  mutate(Year = as.factor(Year), 
         Plot = as.factor(Plot),
          psurvival = factor(psurvival, levels = c(0, 1)),
          psurvivalT1 = as.character(psurvivalT1),
         psurvivalT1 = factor(psurvivalT1, levels = c(0, 1)),
         pflower = factor(pflower, levels = c(0, 1)),
         pflowerT1 = factor(pflowerT1, levels = c(0, 1)),
    size = if_else(No.leaves > 0& Leaf.length>0, log(No.leaves* Leaf.length), NA),
         sizeT1 = lead(size),
    trt = as.factor(trt),
    trt = fct_relevel(trt, "irrigated", "control", "drought")) %>% 
  filter(Plot != "11")


```

```{r Sample Plots}
#sample plots
lom %>% ggplot(aes(x = size, y = sizeT1, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "black", linewidth = .2)
lom %>% ggplot(aes(x = size, y = sizeT1, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Year)+
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "black", linewidth = .2)
lom %>% ggplot(aes(x = size, y = sizeT1, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Plot)+
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "black", linewidth = .2)
#plot 11 probably needs to be excluded
#survival
lom %>% filter(!is.na(psurvivalT1)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = size, y = as.numeric(psurvivalT1)-1, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)
lom %>% filter(!is.na(psurvivalT1)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = size, y = as.numeric(psurvivalT1)-1, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Year)
lom %>% filter(!is.na(psurvivalT1)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = size,  y = as.numeric(psurvivalT1)-1, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Plot)

#flowering
lom %>% filter(!is.na(pflowerT1)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = size, y = as.numeric(pflowerT1)-1, color = trt))+
  geom_jitter()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)
lom %>% filter(!is.na(pflowerT)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = size, y = as.numeric(pflowerT1), color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Year)
lom %>% filter(!is.na(pflowerT1)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = size,  y = as.numeric(pflowerT1), color = trt))+
  geom_jitter()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="binomial"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Plot)

#no.umbels
lom %>% filter(pflowerT == 1) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = size, y = No.panicles, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="poisson"), se = F)
lom %>% filter(pflowerT == 1) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = size, y = No.panicles, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="poisson"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Year)
lom %>% filter(pflowerT == 1) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = size,  y = No.panicles, color = trt))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method="glm",
    method.args=list(family="poisson"), se = F)+
  facet_wrap(~Plot)
```
I think we need to do somethign separately with teh small guys (which shoul dbe new recruits) - my guess is they have differnet survival than the adults. fine for now but need to go through and deal with soctt's code!

```{r growth model selection}
gm.base.size <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.base.trt <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size+ trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.base.trt.int <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)

##grow season total precip
gm.gs.precip <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size  + spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.gs.precip.int <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size *spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.gs.precip.trt <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size  + spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.gs.precip.trt.int1 <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size *spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.gs.precip.trt.int2 <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size  + spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.gs.precip.trt.int3 <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size *spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)

#grow season ave temp
gm.gs.av.temp <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size + spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.int <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size*spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.trt <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size + spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.trt.int1 <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size*spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.trt.int2 <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size + spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.gs.av.temp.trt.int3 <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size*spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)

#summer av temp
gm.summer.av.temp <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size + summer.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.int <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size*summer.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.trt <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size + summer.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.trt.int1 <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size*summer.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.trt.int2 <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size + summer.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.summer.av.temp.trt.int3 <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size*summer.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)

#summer precip
gm.summer.p <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size + summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.int <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size*summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size + summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int1 <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size*summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int2 <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size + summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)
gm.summer.p.trt.int3 <- lmer(sizeT1 ~ size*summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, REML = F)

################################################################################
###
growth <- mget(ls(pattern = "^gm")) #make a list of all of those models that start with gm (^ means start with)
growth_AICc<-aictab(cand.set = growth, modnames = NULL,second.ord=TRUE,nobs=NULL,sort=TRUE)

#rm(list = ls()[grepl("gm", ls())]) #removes everything with gm

# saving AIC table:
## names of models:
# names <- as.data.frame(names(growth))
# growth_AICc <- growth_AICc %>% 
#   arrange(Modnames)
# 
# names=data.frame(model.names = c(1:105))
# growth_AICc$model.names[[i]]
# 
# for (i in 1:105) {
#     names$formulas[[i]]<- formula(growth[[i]])
#     names$formulas <- names$formulas
# }

AIC.save <- growth_AICc %>% 
  arrange(AICc) %>% 
  slice_head(n =10)
AIC.save$vitalrate <- "growth"

summary(gm.summer.av.temp.trt.int2)
#the three way interaction is better, but for now just do this!
```

```{r growth figure}
pred.dat.g <- expand.grid(size = seq(min(lom$size, na.rm = TRUE), max(lom$size, na.rm = TRUE), by = .1), summer.mean.temp = c(-2, 2), trt = c("irrigated", "control", "drought"))
pred.dat.output.g <- cbind(pred.dat.g, as.data.frame(predict(gm.summer.av.temp.trt.int3, newdata = pred.dat.g, type="response", re.form=~0, pred.var=TRUE)))
colnames(pred.dat.output.g)[ncol(pred.dat.output.g)] <- "sizeT1"  # Renaming the last column


(growth <- lom %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = size, y = sizeT1))+
  geom_point(data = lom ,alpha = 0.5, shape = 1)+
  geom_line(data = pred.dat.output.g, aes(color = factor(summer.mean.temp)),linewidth = 1.5) +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1), legend.position = "bottom")+
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "grey", linewidth = .4)+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Summer temp", values = c("cyan4","maroon"), labels = c("cool", "warm")) +
  #scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25),  labels = function(y) round(exp(y), 0))+
  #scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
    facet_wrap(~trt)+
  labs(x = "log(Number of Stems) in t", y = "log(Number of Stems) in t + 1"))

ggsave(here("Figures", "lomatium", "growth.3int.png"), plot = growth, width = 12, height =8)


```

```{r pflower model selection}
fm.base.size <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.base.trt <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size+ trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.base.trt.int <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")

##grow season total precip
fm.gs.precip <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size  + spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.precip.int <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size *spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.precip.trt <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size  + spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.precip.trt.int1 <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size *spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.precip.trt.int2 <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size  + spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
#fm.gs.precip.trt.int3 <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size *spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")

#grow season ave temp
fm.gs.av.temp <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size + spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.av.temp.int <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size*spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.av.temp.trt <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size + spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.av.temp.trt.int1 <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size*spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.gs.av.temp.trt.int2 <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size + spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
#fm.gs.av.temp.trt.int3 <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size*spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")

#summer av temp
fm.summer.av.temp <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size + summer.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.av.temp.int <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size*summer.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.av.temp.trt <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size + summer.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.av.temp.trt.int1 <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size*summer.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.av.temp.trt.int2 <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size + summer.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
#fm.summer.av.temp.trt.int3 <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size*summer.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")

#summer precip
fm.summer.p <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size + summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.p.int <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size*summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.p.trt <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size + summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.p.trt.int1 <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size*summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
fm.summer.p.trt.int2 <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size + summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
#fm.summer.p.trt.int3 <- glmer(pflowerT1 ~ size*summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")

################################################################################
###
pflower <- mget(ls(pattern = "^fm")) #make a list of all of those models that start with gm (^ means start with)
pflower_AICc<-aictab(cand.set = pflower, modnames = NULL,second.ord=TRUE,nobs=NULL,sort=TRUE)

#rm(list = ls()[grepl("gm", ls())]) #removes everything with gm

# saving AIC table:
## names of models:
# names <- as.data.frame(names(growth))
# growth_AICc <- growth_AICc %>% 
#   arrange(Modnames)
# 
# names=data.frame(model.names = c(1:105))
# growth_AICc$model.names[[i]]
# 
# for (i in 1:105) {
#     names$formulas[[i]]<- formula(growth[[i]])
#     names$formulas <- names$formulas
# }

AIC.save <- pflower_AICc %>% 
  arrange(AICc) %>% 
  slice_head(n =10)
AIC.save$vitalrate <- "pflower"

summary(fm.summer.av.temp.trt.int2

)
```

```{r pflower figure}
pred.dat.p <- expand.grid(size = seq(min(lom$size, na.rm = TRUE), max(lom$size, na.rm = TRUE), by = .1), summer.mean.temp = c(-2, 2), trt = c("irrigated", "control", "drought"))
pred.dat.output.p <- cbind(pred.dat.p, as.data.frame(predict(fm.summer.av.temp.trt.int2, newdata = pred.dat.p, type="response", re.form=~0, pred.var=TRUE)))
colnames(pred.dat.output.p)[ncol(pred.dat.output.p)] <- "pflowerT1"  # Renaming the last column

# (flowering <- lom %>% 
#   ggplot(aes(x = size, y = pflowerT))+
#   geom_point(aes(data = lom ,alpha = 0.5, size = summer.tot.precip), shape = 1)+
#   #geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == 0), aes(x = size, y = pflowerT), color = "grey", size = 1.5)+ 
#   geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == 1), aes(x = size, y = pflowerT), color = "lightblue", size = 1.5)+ 
#   geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == -1), aes(x = size, y = pflowerT), color = "orange", size = 1.5)+ 
#   theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1))+
#   geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "grey", linewidth = .2)+
#   scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5))+
#   scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5))+
#   labs( x = "log(Number of Stems) in t", y = "log(Number of Stems) in t + 1"))

(flower <- lom %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = size, y = as.numeric(pflowerT1)-1))+
  geom_jitter(data = lom ,alpha = 0.25, shape = 1, height = .05, width = 0.05)+
  geom_line(data = pred.dat.output.p, aes(y = pflowerT1, color = factor(summer.mean.temp)),linewidth = 1.5) +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1), legend.position = "bottom")+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Summer average temp", values = c("cyan4","maroon"), labels = c("cool", "warm")) +
  #scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
  #scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
    facet_wrap(~trt)+
  labs(x = "log(Number of Stems) in t", y = "Probability of Flowering in t+1"))

ggsave(here("Figures", "lomatium", "flower.png"), plot = flower, width = 12, height =8)

```

```{r survival model selection}
sm.base.size <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.base.trt <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size+ trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.base.trt.int <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")

##grow season total precip
sm.gs.precip <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size  + spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.precip.int <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size *spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.precip.trt <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size  + spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.precip.trt.int1 <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size *spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.precip.trt.int2 <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size  + spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
#sm.gs.precip.trt.int3 <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size *spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")

#grow season ave temp
sm.gs.av.temp <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size + spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.av.temp.int <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size*spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.av.temp.trt <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size + spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.av.temp.trt.int1 <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size*spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.gs.av.temp.trt.int2 <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size + spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
#sm.gs.av.temp.trt.int3 <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size*spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")

#summer av temp
sm.summer.av.temp <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size + summer.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.av.temp.int <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size*summer.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.av.temp.trt <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size + summer.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.av.temp.trt.int1 <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size*summer.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.av.temp.trt.int2 <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size + summer.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
#sm.summer.av.temp.trt.int3 <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size*summer.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")

#summer precip
sm.summer.p <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size + summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.p.int <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size*summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.p.trt <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size + summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.p.trt.int1 <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size*summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
sm.summer.p.trt.int2 <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size + summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")
#sm.summer.p.trt.int3 <- glmer(psurvivalT1 ~ size*summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = lom, family = "binomial")

################################################################################
###
surv <- mget(ls(pattern = "^sm")) #make a list of all of those models that start with gm (^ means start with)
surv_AICc<-aictab(cand.set = surv, modnames = NULL,second.ord=TRUE,nobs=NULL,sort=TRUE)

#rm(list = ls()[grepl("gm", ls())]) #removes everything with gm

# saving AIC table:
## names of models:
# names <- as.data.frame(names(growth))
# growth_AICc <- growth_AICc %>% 
#   arrange(Modnames)
# 
# names=data.frame(model.names = c(1:105))
# growth_AICc$model.names[[i]]
# 
# for (i in 1:105) {
#     names$formulas[[i]]<- formula(growth[[i]])
#     names$formulas <- names$formulas
# }

AIC.save <- surv_AICc %>% 
  arrange(AICc) %>% 
  slice_head(n =10)
AIC.save$vitalrate <- "survival"

summary(sm.gs.precip.int
)
```

```{r pflower figure}
pred.dat.s <- expand.grid(size = seq(min(lom$size, na.rm = TRUE), max(lom$size, na.rm = TRUE), by = .1), spring.tot.precip = c(-2, 2))
pred.dat.output.s <- cbind(pred.dat.s, as.data.frame(predict(sm.gs.precip.int, newdata = pred.dat.s, type="response", re.form=~0, pred.var=TRUE)))
colnames(pred.dat.output.s)[ncol(pred.dat.output.s)] <- "psurvivalT1"  # Renaming the last column

# (flowering <- lom %>% 
#   ggplot(aes(x = size, y = pflowerT))+
#   geom_point(aes(data = lom ,alpha = 0.5, size = summer.tot.precip), shape = 1)+
#   #geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == 0), aes(x = size, y = pflowerT), color = "grey", size = 1.5)+ 
#   geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == 1), aes(x = size, y = pflowerT), color = "lightblue", size = 1.5)+ 
#   geom_line(data = subset(pred.dat.output.g, summer.tot.precip == -1), aes(x = size, y = pflowerT), color = "orange", size = 1.5)+ 
#   theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1))+
#   geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color= "grey", linewidth = .2)+
#   scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5))+
#   scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5))+
#   labs( x = "log(Number of Stems) in t", y = "log(Number of Stems) in t + 1"))

(survival <- lom %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = size, y = as.numeric(psurvivalT1)-1))+
  geom_jitter(data = lom ,alpha = 0.25, shape = 1, height = .05, width = 0.05)+
  geom_line(data = pred.dat.output.s, aes(y = psurvivalT1, color = factor(spring.tot.precip)),linewidth = 1.5) +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1), legend.position = "bottom")+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Spring average temp", values = c("darkorange","deepskyblue"), labels = c("Dry", "Wet")) +
  #scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
  #scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
  labs(x = "log(Number of Stems) in t", y = "Probability of Survival in t + 1"))

(survival <- lom %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = size, y = psurvivalT1))+
  geom_jitter(data = lom ,alpha = 0.25, shape = 1, height = .05, width = 0.05)+
  geom_line(data = pred.dat.output.s, aes(y = psurvivalT1, color = factor(spring.tot.precip)),linewidth = 1.5) +
  theme(axis.line = element_line(colour = 'black', linewidth = 1.1), legend.position = "bottom")+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Spring average temp", values = c("darkorange","deepskyblue"), labels = c("Dry", "Wet")) +
  #scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
  #scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-.25, 5.25))+
  labs(x = "log(Number of Stems) in t", y = "Probability of Survival in t + 1"))

ggsave(here("Figures", "lomatium", "survival.png"), plot = survival, width = 8, height =8)

```

```{r panicles model selection}
poisson.base.size <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.base.trt <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size+ trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.base.trt.int <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")

##grow season total precip
poisson.gs.precip <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size  + spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.precip.int <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size *spring.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.precip.trt <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size  + spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.precip.trt.int1 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size *spring.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.precip.trt.int2 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size  + spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.precip.trt.int3 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size *spring.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")

#grow season ave temp
poisson.gs.av.temp <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size + spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.av.temp.int <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size*spring.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.av.temp.trt <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size + spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.av.temp.trt.int1 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size*spring.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.av.temp.trt.int2 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size + spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.gs.av.temp.trt.int3 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size*spring.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")

#summer av temp
poisson.summer.av.temp <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size + summer.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.av.temp.int <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size*summer.mean.temp + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.av.temp.trt <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size + summer.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.av.temp.trt.int1 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size*summer.mean.temp + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.av.temp.trt.int2 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size + summer.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.av.temp.trt.int3 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size*summer.mean.temp*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")

#summer precip
poisson.summer.p <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size + summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.p.int <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size*summer.tot.precip + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.p.trt <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size + summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.p.trt.int1 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size*summer.tot.precip + trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.p.trt.int2 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size + summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")
poisson.summer.p.trt.int3 <- glmer(No.panicles ~ size*summer.tot.precip*trt + (1|Plot) + (1|Year), data = subset(lom, pflowerT == "1"), family = "poisson")

################################################################################
###
panicles <- mget(ls(pattern = "^poisson")) #make a list of all of those models that start with gm (^ means start with)
panicles_AICc<-aictab(cand.set = panicles, modnames = NULL,second.ord=TRUE,nobs=NULL,sort=TRUE)

#rm(list = ls()[grepl("gm", ls())]) #removes everything with gm

# saving AIC table:
## names of models:
# names <- as.data.frame(names(growth))
# growth_AICc <- growth_AICc %>% 
#   arrange(Modnames)
# 
# names=data.frame(model.names = c(1:105))
# growth_AICc$model.names[[i]]
# 
# for (i in 1:105) {
#     names$formulas[[i]]<- formula(growth[[i]])
#     names$formulas <- names$formulas
# }

AIC.save <- panicles_AICc %>% 
  arrange(AICc) %>% 
  slice_head(n =10)
AIC.save$vitalrate <- "no.panicles"

summary(poisson.summer.av.temp.int
)
```
